div1.entryFree:
Palpable, such as might be touched and handled: in form as p. as this (dagger) which now I draw, Mcb. II, 1, 40. Hence == obvious, manifest: (lies) gross as a mountain, open, p. H4A II, 4, 250. this p. device, R3 III, 6, 11. a very p. hit, Hml. V, 2, 292. 'tis probable and p. to thinking, Oth. I, 2, 76.
Adverbially: this p. gross play, Mids. V, 374, i. e. so gross, that it requires no judgment to perceive its grossness (some M. Edd. palpable-gross).
